name: James Carville
subject: I'm asking, team (Alabama)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We may do things a little bit differently in the South, but unfit for office is unfit for office -- and no matter where you come from, what kind of accent you talk with, or how you like your eggs, the fact is that Roy Moore is unfit to serve in the U.S. Senate.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171211-Carville-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team,

We may do things a little bit differently in the South, but unfit for office is unfit for office -- and no matter where you come from, what kind of accent you talk with, or how you like your eggs, the fact is that **Roy Moore is unfit to serve in the U.S. Senate.**

Now, look, a lot of pundits say that doesn't matter. They say that, no matter how strong a candidate Doug Jones is, Democrats ain't winning in Alabama.

**But you know something? It isn 't up to them. **You and I still have one more day to make sure Doug has the resources he needs to finish this race strong and compete for every vote in tomorrow's special election.

**That 's why I'm asking you, team: [Pitch in $1 right now to stand with Doug before the polls close and help Democrats fight for every single state!](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171211-Carville-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

I don't know about you, but I'm tired of listening to people telling me where Democrats can and can't win. It's up to us to decide where there's a fight worth winning -- and then to go and win the dang thing.

And there's no fight more worth fighting than this one. Doug Jones has been on the right side of history his whole life, and there was never any doubt in my mind that jumping into this special election campaign with both feet was the right thing to do.

Sure, Alabama hasn't elected a Democratic Senator in more than 20 years -- but there's never been a stronger Democrat on the ballot than Doug. And I don't know that I've ever seen a more unfit candidate for office anywhere than Roy Moore.

**But now we 're in crunch time, with less than 24 hours left before the voters start speaking their mind at the polls.**

So forget about the pundits and forget about the polls and forget about the odds. This ain't about odds. This is about right and wrong. You and I both know that the right thing to do is to fight like hell for Doug Jones until the last vote is counted. And this is your last, best chance to do it.

[**So click here right now and contribute $1 to get the right guy across the finish line first and help Democrats fight the fights worth winning all across the country.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171211-Carville-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Let's go do this.

James

Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. name: Beth Lindstrom
subject: President Warren?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beth Lindstrom for U
body:
If you thought Hillary Clinton was bad, she has nothing on Elizabeth Warren. | [](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/45513833:WjCJdio7N:m:1:1155937413:08F228719E903DD1EF912D89F260F967:r)
---
Peter,

I am running for the United States Senate because **we must stop the ultra-liberal Elizabeth Warren from becoming the next president.**

Ranked as the most liberal Senator in DC, Elizabeth Warren has her sights on 2020, _but first she must win re-election in 2018._

**_[Will you help me stop her?](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/45513833:WjCJdio7N:m:1:1155937413:08F228719E903DD1EF912D89F260F967:r)**_
I am running for the United States Senate to fix a broken Washington and, **_[with your help right now](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/45513833:WjCJdio7N:m:1:1155937413:08F228719E903DD1EF912D89F260F967:r)**_ , stop Elizabeth Warren's presidential aspirations cold.

**If you thought Hillary Clinton was bad, she has nothing on Elizabeth Warren.**

**_She is all wrong for America._**
A true liberal, Elizabeth Warren thinks government must protect us from everything ...

She has been called "shrill" and "unhinged" **_by members of her own party**_ ...

Her scorched earth politics have added nothing to the United States Senate and are not what we need as President ...

Peter, I am a mother, wife, and small business owner who has had enough of the ugly politics as usual in Washington: the finger-pointing, the name calling, and the grandstanding. **_Elizabeth Warren represents everything that is so distasteful in our political system.**_

**She is the ultimate hypocrite:**

**_She claims that she is not wealthy ... but lives in a $5 million dollar mansion in Cambridge, Massachusetts.**_

**_She rails against Wall Street ... but gladly takes their campaign cash.**_

**_She lectures and rages against her political opponents ... but has no major accomplishments to her name.**_

**She must be stopped.**
**_[Help STOP Elizabeth Warren with $10](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/45513834:WjCJdio7N:m:1:1155937413:08F228719E903DD1EF912D89F260F967:r)**_
**_[Help STOP Elizabeth Warren with $35](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/45513835:WjCJdio7N:m:1:1155937413:08F228719E903DD1EF912D89F260F967:r)**_
**_[Help STOP Elizabeth Warren with $50](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/45513836:WjCJdio7N:m:1:1155937413:08F228719E903DD1EF912D89F260F967:r)**_
**_[Help STOP Elizabeth Warren with $100](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/45513837:WjCJdio7N:m:1:1155937413:08F228719E903DD1EF912D89F260F967:r)**_
**_[Help STOP Elizabeth Warren with $250](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/45513838:WjCJdio7N:m:1:1155937413:08F228719E903DD1EF912D89F260F967:r)**_
**_[Help STOP Elizabeth Warren with another amount](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/45513833:WjCJdio7N:m:1:1155937413:08F228719E903DD1EF912D89F260F967:r)**_
If you care about growing our economy and spurring job growth ... if you care about keeping our nation safe and our borders secure ... if you care about electing leaders who will actually lead and put the people ahead of their own political aspirations ... **_if you care about the future of our country,_[please stand with me today.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/45513833:WjCJdio7N:m:1:1155937413:08F228719E903DD1EF912D89F260F967:r)_**_

You are one of our nation's most committed conservatives and you can help bring a new voice to the United States Senate ... mine.

Elizabeth Warren is supported by far left groups, Hollywood progressives, and liberal special interests who do not support our free-market conservative agenda. **_Taking on a DC insider who is the reigning queen of the liberal establishment will not be easy or cheap but it can be done.**_

**We need to start strong and never let up.** **_[Please stand with me today!](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/45513833:WjCJdio7N:m:1:1155937413:08F228719E903DD1EF912D89F260F967:r)**_

Beth Lindstrom
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

| [**Contribute »**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/45513833:WjCJdio7N:m:1:1155937413:08F228719E903DD1EF912D89F260F967:r)

name: Democrats.org
subject: [LAST CHANCE] Support Doug Jones
body:
Time is running out to help Doug Jones beat Roy Moore.
---
**Today's Election Day in Alabama!
Split a donation between Doug Jones and the DNC to help elect Doug to the Senate and Democrats around the country.

**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523e54/4067b0a/4ed274013/7e5adeb5/939217224/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Doug-Jones-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171212_dnc2_v1s1&source=em_20171212_dnc2_v1s1&refcode=em_20171212_dnc2_v1s1")****
Derek, today we have a chance to win a U.S. Senate seat in the state of Alabama.

The polls are extremely close, and Alabamians woke up this morning to robocalls from Donald Trump encouraging folks to get out and vote for Roy Moore -- a man of such profound moral failure that even Alabama's own senior senator said he could not vote for him.

Everything is on the line today -- Alabama does not have early voting, which means that every in-person vote cast in this election will be in the next few hours.

**Rush a contribution to Doug Jones and the DNC so we can give this race everything we've got and elect Democrats in every state.

** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be divided evenly between the DNC and Doug Jones for Senate._

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Thanks for supporting our party.

Split a donation between Doug Jones and the DNC to help elect Doug to the Senate and Democrats around the country. ""** Derek, today we have a chance to win a U.S. Senate seat in the state of Alabama. The polls are extremely close, and Alabamians woke up this morning to robocalls from Donald Trump encouraging folks to get out and vote for Roy Moore -- a man of such profound moral failure that even Alabama's own senior senator said he could not vote for him. Everything is on the line today -- Alabama does not have early voting, which means that every in-person vote cast in this election will be in the next few hours. Rush a contribution to Doug Jones and the DNC so we can give this race everything we've got and elect Democrats in every state. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be divided evenly between the DNC and Doug Jones for Senate. | As technology continues to advance, so do campaigns. If you're running for office in 2018 -- or you're volunteering for a candidate or your local Republican Party next year -- **you're going to want to get trained on the latest voter technology**.

[REGISTER NOW](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=aefc966668&e=1acd9bb3d6) for [Congress of Counties](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f6e1b456c4&e=1acd9bb3d6), where we'll be be offering**personalized, 30-minute demonstrations** on our 2018 mobile application for door-to-door and telephone voter contact, in addition to **two days of panels and presentations** to get you geared up for 2018 campaigns!

clean_body: Friend, our race is kicking into high gear as we head into 2018. Just this week I got some very exciting news. Friend, our race is kicking into high gear as we head into 2018. Just this week I got some very exciting news. Senator Dave Craig is endorsing my campaign for U.S. Senate! Just check out a bit of his statement below: "I know Leah Vukmir will vote the right way on the Senate floor because I have seen her do it. I know that Leah Vukmir will passionately argue for conservative ideals when TV cameras are off, because I have seen her do it. And I know that Leah Vukmir will fight big government policies brought forward not only from Democrats but from other Republicans as well, because I have seen her do that, time and time again. ... Amy and I support Leah Vukmir for U.S. Senate because she is the verified choice for our family and Wisconsin." Friend, I couldn't be happier to see strong Wisconsinites uniting behind our mission to end Washington dysfunction. And Dave's kind words could not have come at a better time. I’m going to need every conservative on my side when we get to the New Year. If we stick together, we will bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington. Thanks, Friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

Subject: Shocking polling in Florida Primary

Hello,

Right now, _POLITICO Florida_ is reporting that we are in a two-person race for the Democratic nomination for Governor in Florida.

This is coming off of two polls showing us either in an extraordinarily strong second or statistically tied for the lead among candidates in this race.

**I know this won't be shocking to you, but it'll shock many.**

That's because Andrew Gillum is an unapologetic progressive. Andrew's on the right side of history on issues like equal rights, public education, affordable healthcare, clean energy, immigration -- everything that will get Democrats excited to vote in 2018.

**[And he's exactly who we need leading Florida forward. If you're with us, can you chip in whatever you can and keep up the momentum?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb323e/9e00690/418c800c/24032bb7/2820959457/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-poll?utm_campaign=em17_171212_pollfwd_fnd_gq_ful__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=eem17_171212_pollfwd_fnd_gq_ful__TG&utm_content=4+-+And+hes+exactly+who+we+need+leading+Flor")**

This poll makes it clear that Florida doesn't want an out-of-touch politician with a famous last name or someone with a history of voting with Republicans. It is possible for the son of a construction worker and a school bus driver -- the first to graduate from college in his family -- to win this nomination.

Because Andrew is just like us: Proud to be a progressive Democrat.

This is our moment. We can't let up. If we all do our small part, we will win the nomination, and put a real, progressive, proud Democrat in the Governor's Office. Now that will be shocking -- to Republicans.

**[If having a proud progressive on the verge of leading this primary campaign gets you excited about 2018, chip in whatever you can afford now.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb323e/9e00690/418c800c/24032bb6/2820959457/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-poll?utm_campaign=em17_171212_pollfwd_fnd_gq_ful__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=eem17_171212_pollfwd_fnd_gq_ful__TG&utm_content=5+-+If+having+a+proud+progressive+on+the+ver")**

Geoff

We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f19/24c69fd9/1539b84bf/1890ba30/969897907/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEL19N_digital_email_20171212_StateLegsON_inact&source=WQEFEL19N_digital_email_20171212_StateLegsON_inact")
---

Peter,

With all the drama from the White House and Congress, state-level Republicans may have thought they could keep pushing their anti-choice agendas without us noticing.

Boy, were they ever wrong.

We're targeting 598 state legislative seats next year, our biggest state effort ever.

Defunding Planned Parenthood, passing abortion bans -- it's time to show we've had enough.

**[Donate $3 to recruit and train pro-choice Democratic women to run for these 598 seats and put an end to the years of attacks on choice.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f19/24c69fd9/1539b84bf/1890ba31/969897907/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171212_email_StateLegislaturesOnNotice?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+recruit+and+train+prochoice+&utm_campaign=WQEFEL19N_digital_email_20171212_StateLegsON_inact&source=WQEFEL19N_digital_email_20171212_StateLegsON_inact")**

In July -- because it wasn't enough to just target individual Republicans -- we put 12 entire state chambers "On Notice" for their anti-choice track records.

Our list included the Ohio Senate, where the GOP introduced a bill to force women to choose cremation or burial after an abortion or risk facing _criminal charges_.

And Colorado Senate Republicans wanted to force doctors to lie to women about the myth of so-called "abortion reversal."

The list goes on, and it's not pretty. But after our big wins in Virginia and across the country this fall, we're confident voters are ready for new, progressive leadership at the state level.

And we know pro-choice Democratic women are the candidates to meet that need.

**Donate $3 to elect pro-choice Democratic women to state legislatures and put a stop to anti-choice bills:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Women-Stop-Choice-Attacks](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f19/24c69fd9/1539b84bf/1890ba32/969897907/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171212_email_StateLegislaturesOnNotice?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectWomenStopCh&utm_campaign=WQEFEL19N_digital_email_20171212_StateLegsON_inact&source=WQEFEL19N_digital_email_20171212_StateLegsON_inact")**

Thanks,

Christina Reynolds
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501132242%2501Important%2bWork%2bto%2bFinish%2bBefore%2bthe%2bYear%2527s%2bEnd%250114227QQQ7327115QQQ3667066QQQ7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501132242%2501Important%2bWork%2bto%2bFinish%2bBefore%2bthe%2bYear%2527s%2bEnd%250114227QQQ7327115QQQ3667066QQQ7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **December 12, 2017** |
---|---|---|---
| | | This has been a crazy year--and there are some major things that Congress needs to do before the year ends. Republicans have once again pushed off important priorities, creating artificial deadlines and leaving many facing uncertainty. And instead of tackling the critical issues that face our country, the GOP is attempting to give a $1.5 trillion tax windfall to the uber-wealthy and special interests--and leave millions of working families to pay the price. I've heard from many of you about these issues, and I share your concerns. I will continue fighting for Maryland's priorities as these end-of-year discussions move forward.
Chris Van Hollen
---
### **Fighting the GOP Tax Giveaway**
Under their tax plan, President Trump and Republicans in the House and Senate put powerful corporate interests before their constituents--plain and simple. It is a huge giveaway to special interests and the uber-rich, and it forces millions of middle-class Americans to foot the bill. What's more, this legislation adds over $1 trillion to our national debt, and Republicans are already looking to slash programs like Medicare and Medicaid to pay for this corporate giveaway.

Maryland is hit particularly hard because Republicans have decided to double-tax families who currently deduct their state and local taxes--while still letting corporations take the deduction. I brought together my Senate colleagues in Maryland, California, New York, and New Jersey--the four states hit hardest by the Republican tax plan--and we sent a letter to the House Republicans in our delegations to urge them to oppose a bill that would raise taxes on their own constituents to fund corporate giveaways.

Sadly, Republicans in Congress have made it clear that they care little for transparency or bipartisanship. The legislation was passed in the dark of night, and the final 500-page bill was distributed just hours before the vote. Instead of holding hearings, meeting with experts, and discussing this bill with our constituents, the Republicans have pushed this bill--legislation that will impact our economy for years to come--through the Senate with little regard to how much it will hurt working Americans.

This is what we do know: millions of middle-class families are going to pay more, while big corporations, rich foreign stockholders, hedge funds, and the top one percent get a massive tax giveaway that will line their pockets but won't grow paychecks for working people. Roughly one-third of U.S. corporate stock is owned by foreign investors, and the corporate tax cuts in the Senate Republican bill would deliver a $31 billion windfall to these wealthy foreign shareholders in 2019 alone. But the fight isn't over yet. I will continue to fight passage with every tool I've got. Over the last month, I've heard from thousands of concerned Marylanders, and I urge folks here and around the country not to let up. You deserve better.
#
### **Preventing a Government Shutdown**
Instead of focusing on lining the pockets of big corporations, Congress must focus on ensuring that the federal government remains open and continues to provide Americans with vital services. A government shutdown would have very damaging impacts on Maryland families and the nation and would disrupt and undermine everything from lifesaving medical research to food safety inspections to Head Start programs educating our children. It's also estimated that it would cost our economy over $6 billion a week.

As part of the government funding conversation, Congress must immediately fund the Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP). This bipartisan program provides health insurance to 9 million kids across America, including over 142,000 in Maryland. Republicans have also let funding for community health centers expire in September--in our state alone, community health centers providing services and care to over 300,000 Marylanders. That Congress has left these two bipartisan, non-controversial programs in jeopardy is shameful. We must fund these programs by the end of the year--the need is dire. Additionally, I am committed to ensuring stability and security for Dreamers and people here under Temporary Protected Status (TPS). In Maryland, we have almost 10,000 Dreamers and over 22,000 TPS Recipients--their future is in our hands. We must give these families the stability they deserve, and we should address these issues urgently.

I urge my Republican colleagues to work with us on a long-term plan that keeps the government open and addresses priorities that are vital to our economic growth and the well-being of our communities.

### **Don 't forget - Open Enrollment!**
There are only a few days left to enroll in health care through the [Maryland Health Connection](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=14227QQQ7327115QQQ3667066QQQ7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.marylandhealthconnection.gov%2f&redir_log=621354806748293). While there's been a lot of confusion out there--I want you to know the Affordable Care Act is still the law of the land, despite efforts by President Trump to sabotage it. The [Maryland Health Connection](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=14227QQQ7327115QQQ3667066QQQ7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.marylandhealthconnection.gov%2f&redir_log=621354806748293) offers many Marylanders options for affordable care. In fact, 9 out of 10 people who enroll qualify for financial help to lower their costs. Plus, many Marylanders who qualify for financial help will actually pay less in 2018 than this year for coverage. That's why it's so important for folks to log on and check out their options. Maryland's 2018 Open Enrollment period--when anyone can sign up for health care on the exchange--began November 1, 2017 and only lasts until December 15, 2017\. If you don't have health insurance, the [Maryland Health Connection](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=14227QQQ7327115QQQ3667066QQQ7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.marylandhealthconnection.gov%2f&redir_log=621354806748293) can help you get covered. I encourage everyone, including folks who already have a plan, to log on to the exchange and shop around.
|
---

Hello,
In just a couple of days, Federal Communications Commission (FCC) Chairman Ajit Pai plans to hold a vote on repealing net neutrality rules, the rules put in place to protect a free and open Internet.
[**The vote is currently scheduled for Thursday, so we 're running out of time. Please sign our petition now to urge the FCC to protect net neutrality.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf85/2a380d31/1eca043/fe3d95/1884124450/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/savenetneutrality/?code=hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_net-neutrality-up&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Net neutrality is what prevents Internet service providers like AT&T, Comcast, and Verizon from speeding up or impeding your connection, and from dictating the websites, applications, and content you can use. In short, it preserves your right to communicate freely online.
**Without net neutrality, ISPs would be able to slow down their competitors ' content or stop you from seeing important news or political stories, just because they disagree with it.**
[**If maintaining a free and open Internet is important to you, please sign our petition before the December 14th vote and call on the FCC and Chairman Pai to save net neutrality.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf85/2a380d31/1eca043/fe3d95/1884124450/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/savenetneutrality/?code=hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_net-neutrality-up&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
If the Trump administration's plan is approved, it will fundamentally change how consumers use the Internet forever, so thank you for speaking up,
Team Maggie

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Net neutrality
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| What is your favorite thing to do on the Internet today? Read emails? Check the news? Play games? You can usually find me posting healthy food on my Instagram, @CleanCookingCongresswoman. Unfortunately, thanks to Donald Trump, whatever you do on the Internet could get much more complicated in the coming days. **The FCC under the Trump Administration is about to repeal Obama-era net neutrality protections.[_Add your name to my petition to protect net neutrality._](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e48/622b7b5b/18179e6e/307ba5b0/2173301109/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171206")** Net neutrality is the principle that all content on the Internet is equal. Internet Service Providers (ISPs) can't charge companies to deliver content faster. They can't block or slow down content, either. This is how the Internet grew as a breeding ground for innovation and entrepreneurship. President Obama put protections in place for net neutrality. **On December 14th, the Trump FCC will vote on ending those protections.** [_**We don't have much time to voice our opinions on this. Speak out with me to defend net neutrality. Add your name.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e48/622b7b5b/18179e6e/307ba5b0/2173301109/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171206") Without net neutrality, ISPs can pad their profits by essentially providing you worse service. Your favorite streaming website could be throttled. Let's make our voices heard. Thank you, Debbie |

With that victory, **Georgia Democrats broke the Republican supermajority!**

name: Chairwoman Terrie Rizzo
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Hi there,

I want to take a moment to introduce myself. My name is Terrie, and last Saturday I had the honor of being elected the next chair of the Florida Democratic Party.

This was the first chairperson election with an all-woman slate of candidates in our state party's history, and I think that speaks to the forward-looking vision Florida Democrats have going into 2018.

We must focus on grassroots actions in every ZIP code, whether that's encouraging voter turnout, training local activists, or working to hold Republicans accountable.

I'll be in touch with ways you can help us Flip Florida Blue in 2018 and retake the White House in 2020. Right now, I want to thank you for your passion, action, and support. Working together, I know we will build a Better Florida and propel Democrats.

It is a privilege to take this next step and lead our party to victory in 2018.

Forward Together,

Terrie Rizzo
Chairwoman, Florida Democratic Party

name: Susan Sarandon
subject: Establishment media is noticing Our Revolution
body:
Since Our Revolution started, a little more than a year ago, local groups and people like you have cut through the noise of everyday politics and advanced a progressive agenda.
#
Dear Friend,
Since Our Revolution started, a little more than a year ago, local groups and people like you have cut through the noise of everyday politics and advanced a progressive agenda. Together, we have uplifted new leadership and moved forward policies that directly benefit working families, not the billionaires and wealthy corporations.
All of our hard work is gaining recognition. Just this past Monday, December 4, Politico's Playbook named Senator Nina Turner to their Power List, proclaiming her among the [**18 to Watch in 2018**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7adc6/bed43eb/21b0855f/75fe8740/150542363/VEsH/ "https://www.politico.com/interactives/2017/politico-power-list/nina-turner/"). Like Senator Sanders said when they were together at the Protecting Working Families Rally in Reading, Pennsylvania, she is "undertaking a task which is perhaps the most important work that anybody in America could be doing. She is running all over this country creating political revolutions."
The bedrock of this movement is the people, and you have helped show this country a brighter future. Together, we have grown to more than 500 local groups, and since 2016 almost half of our endorsed candidates were elected to public office. One of our endorsed candidates, Pramila Jayapal, who was recently elected to Congress, was also featured in the "18 to Watch in 2018" Power List.
In a crowded field of Beltway influencers, media executives, and lobbyists, this recognition of Senator Turner is proof that the political elites are paying attention to our movement and are seeing the results of our hard work.
The 2018 elections are fast approaching. Together, we can continue to bring the political revolution to all 50 states, but we need your support. Click below to find out the best way to get involved in your community today.
**[GET INVOLVED»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7adc6/bed43eb/21b0855f/75fe8743/150542363/VEsE/ "https://ourrevolution.com/thanks/")**
In solidarity,
Susan Sarandon

name: Team Kaine
subject: What the Alabama result means for us -->
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Doug Jones' win tonight is huge. He is the first Democrat elected U.S. Senator in Alabama since 1992 and the first Democrat to win a major statewide office since 2006. Alabamians have sent a strong message that principles trump party and that Americans stand united in rejecting sexual abuse and bigotry.

We cannot wait for Doug to get to the Senate to work alongside Tim to advance commonsense ideas to improve people's lives -- and now is the time to make sure we don't reverse the progress we saw tonight. What we can't do is send Donald Trump an ally from Virginia like Corey Stewart, Nick Freitas, or E.W. Jackson.

Instead, we need to keep the momentum of this incredible victory going and ensure a win for Tim next year. **Will you help?** **[Become a founding donor of Tim's re-election campaign by chipping in before 2017 ends.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=clWSlQHb%2FLp%2BVe25Q%2F5ySJ%2FLPX6JMgW%2F)**

| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=2%2FAV3PYuUjtJu7sPu74j1hGvw3LnW19z)
---

If a Democrat can win in deep-red Alabama and if we can potentially flip the Virginia House of Delegates, then a Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate is within reach. But not if we don't re-elect Tim. These wins are made possible by people like you who continue to read these emails, to make phone calls, to click the donate button, to knock on doors, and to continue believing in your own power to create change that helps all families across America. Thank you.

\--Team Kaine

P.S. Forward this email to three friends who should celebrate Doug's victory with us!

| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---

Dear Friend, Since Our Revolution started, a little more than a year ago, local groups and people like you have cut through the noise of everyday politics and advanced a progressive agenda. Together, we have uplifted new leadership and moved forward policies that directly benefit working families, not the billionaires and wealthy corporations. All of our hard work is gaining recognition. Just this past Monday, December 4, Politico's Playbook named Senator Nina Turner to their Power List, proclaiming her among the "". Like Senator Sanders said when they were together at the Protecting Working Families Rally in Reading, Pennsylvania, she is "undertaking a task which is perhaps the most important work that anybody in America could be doing. She is running all over this country creating political revolutions." The bedrock of this movement is the people, and you have helped show this country a brighter future. Together, we have grown to more than 500 local groups, and since 2016 almost half of our endorsed candidates were elected to public office. One of our endorsed candidates, Pramila Jayapal, who was recently elected to Congress, was also featured in the "18 to Watch in 2018" Power List. In a crowded field of Beltway influencers, media executives, and lobbyists, this recognition of Senator Turner is proof that the political elites are paying attention to our movement and are seeing the results of our hard work. The 2018 elections are fast approaching. Together, we can continue to bring the political revolution to all 50 states, but we need your support.
